entry.title: Re: Error 147 DI API - Get CurrentUserInfo failed - Compa...
entry.content:
Hello,

We got the same issues on FP2402 HF1. Have you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: Need groovy script for SAP CPI to loop through the no...
entry.content: Hi @naveen4796, Thank for the quick groovy. Current groovy logic considering adding node where ever the CustomField_BookingHours becomes zero with single TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount. My requirement is to minus(actually plus we need to use as we are getting - sign in the for the value)) the CustomField_BookingHours from each TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and with the balance hours, I need to minus from next TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and with the balance, I need to minus next TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount. LIke this loop, where ever the value becomes >= 0, after that we need to add the node. <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <User> <User> <CustomField_BookingHours>-0.75</CustomField_BookingHours> <bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> <TimeAccount> <timeAccountDetails> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> </timeAccountDetails> </TimeAccount> </User> </User> in SAP CPI, I need to read xml message and from that take value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours which is currently -0.75 and then take value of first /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and add both like 0.5 + (-0.75) then the balance is -0.25 and then take 2nd /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount whoch is 0.5 and add reslted balance which is -0.25, so the result is 0.5 + (-0.25) now new balance is 0.25 which is greater than or eauql to 0, add the new node after 2rd TimeAccountDetail node, after which balanc value becomes >= 0, with field /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours. So the output should be like below <User> <User> <CustomField_BookingHours>-0.75</CustomField_BookingHours> <bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> <TimeAccount> <timeAccountDetails> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>-0.75</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> <TimeAccountDetail> <bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount> <bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate> </TimeAccountDetail> </timeAccountDetails> </TimeAccount> </User> </User>

entry.title: Re: Need groovy script for SAP CPI to loop through the no...
entry.content:
Hi @naveen4796 ,

Thank for the quick groovy. Current groovy logic considering adding node where ever the CustomField_BookingHours becomes zero with single TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount. My requirement is to minus(actually plus we need to use as we are getting - sign in the for the value)) the CustomField_BookingHours from each TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and with the balance hours, I need to minus from next TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and with the balance, I need to minus next TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount. LIke this loop, where ever the value becomes >= 0, after that we need to add the node. 

<User>
<User>
<CustomField_BookingHours>-0.75</CustomField_BookingHours>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
<TimeAccount>
<timeAccountDetails>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
</timeAccountDetails>
</TimeAccount>
</User>
</User>

in SAP CPI, I need to read xml message and from that take value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours which is currently -0.75 and then take value of first /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and add both like 0.5 + (-0.75) then the balance is -0.25 and then take 2nd /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount whoch is 0.5 and add reslted balance which is -0.25, so the result is 0.5 + (-0.25) now new balance is 0.25 which is greater than or eauql to 0, add the new node after 2rd TimeAccountDetail node, after which balanc value becomes >= 0, with field /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours. So the output should be like below

<User>
<User>
<CustomField_BookingHours>-0.75</CustomField_BookingHours>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
<TimeAccount>
<timeAccountDetails>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>-0.75</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
</timeAccountDetails>
</TimeAccount>
</User>
</User>

entry.title: Re: New Mail Server
entry.content: Your question is better posted in the SuccessFactors community area not here. This forum is not support oriented for product specific questions like this. Having said that, did your domain change or the mail server technology that you are using change? All of these settings are part of the Admin Center in SuccessFactors. You should fund what you are looking for there.

entry.title: Re: How to link two P ID which itself a UID

entry.title: Re: Delivery completed indicator.
entry.content: ok tks

entry.title: Re: Stock Room Management and SAP TM in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Stock Room Management is integrated with SAP TM via Advanced Shipping and Receiving. Check out the documentation:

Erweiterter Warenannahme- und Versandprozess | SAP Help Portal

ASR integrates IM (Lean Warehouse), Stock Room Management and EWM with SAP TM. It is even possible to manage one transport for all storage solutions.

entry.title: Cutover Management : Planning and Orchestration
entry.content:
CUTOVER: HIGH-LEVEL PLANNING

  • Cutover planning begins with the identification of Key stakeholders who will be actively or passively participating in the Cutover Process
  • Identify the scope of Data Migration Objects; both Master Data and Transactional Data
  • Identify the System Integration Channels and Third-Party Applications which will be impacted during Cutover Process
  • Check the System availability considering Monthly / Weekly / Daily downtime of all connected Systems.
  • Check the availability of resources considering Working hours, Time Zone and Holiday Calendar.
  • Identify any business specific or application specific requirement for migrating Transactional data. Example : some transactions must be in a particular status to be migrated.
  • Identify the requirement of archiving / purging old data in in Legacy System along with System de-commissioning as part Cutover Process.

    CUTOVER  : HIGH-LEVEL PLANNING : ARTIFACTS

    Following artifacts are produced as the output of High-Level Cutover Planning :

    High Level Cutover Plan : Prepare a high-level cutover plan which will depict a flow-chart of major activities and their time of execution during Project Cutover. Example of some of the major activities are :

    • Technical Cutover (Moving the Development and Configuration Objects to Production System)
    • Master Data Migration
    • Transactional Data Migration of individual Objects
    • System Ramp-Down and Ramp Up activities

    Business Milestone Calendar : Prepare a Business Milestone Calendar which will provide a clear guide-line to Business explaining when certain Business process must be stopped in the Legacy System, and when they can be re-started in the new System.

    Who-When-Where Plan : Prepare the detail plan of the resources needed, at what time and in which location (Office / Online / Stand-By) during the cutover.

    CUTOVER: PREPARE TASK LIST

    Once the High-Level Cutover Plan is aligned and approved by the required stakeholders, break-down the activities from High Level Cutover Plan to prepare a detail Cutover Tasks List.
    Cutover Task List should include the following details :

    • Task Description
    • Task Owner
    • Person Responsible
    • Start time and End Time of the Task
    • Task status.

    CUTOVER REHEARSAL: TESTING THE CUTOVER PLAN

    • Like any Products or Services, Cutover Plan must be tested before the actual implementation
      Cutover Plan is tested in UAT (User Acceptance Test) System as part of Cutover Rehearsal.
    • Usually, all the data migration objects, which are in the scope of Cutover Migration are included in Cutover Rehearsal.
    • Entire flow of Cutover activities and their corresponding task are executed in the Test System
    • Capture the issue identified during Rehearsal through defects and ensure they do not occur during actual cutover.
    • Monitor the execution time of each steps, compare that with Cutover Plan, and modify and refine the cutover plan if needed.

    PRODUCTION CUTOVER : PROJECT GO-LIVE

    Production Cutover kicks-off after the formal approval from Steering Committee. Usual pre-requisites are :

    • Successful completion of UAT
    • Successful completion of Cutover Rehearsal, and all Rehearsal Defects are closed
    • Completion of Application Readiness Tasks in Production
    • Completion of Master Data Migration and Validation
    • All logistics and resources are secured based on the Who-When-Where Plan

    During the Production Cutover, the Cutover Tasks are executed as per the Cutover Task List, which includes, System Ramp Down, Migration of Transactional Data, Validation of Transaction Data, System Ramp Up etc.
    Ensure no parallel transaction execution during or post cutover
    After completion of each major check points, Cutover Status Report is shared with all the Stakeholder.
    Post Go-Live Hypercare Support kicks-off and smooth transition to Hypercare Management must be ensured.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Integration with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Create a Connection between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and SAP Datasphere

1.    Introduction

In the fast-paced digital landscape, businesses seek synergy between technology solutions to thrive. SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud offers robust ERP capabilities, while Datasphere empowers data-driven insights. Together, they form a dynamic partnership, driving innovation and efficiency.

In this blog, we unravel the connection between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and Datasphere. From integration strategies to real-world applications, discover how this convergence revolutionizes operational excellence and strategic decision-making.

Join us on a journey towards unlocking the full potential of this transformative partnership, where data-driven insights fuel unprecedented success in the digital era.

To make the same steps you must have enough permissions on the S4 side and on the Datasphere side.

2.    Basic Logic and Setup

We will setup the Connection to work with the S4 data in the Datasphere. To make sure that you have enough permissions to do that connection check the following steps:

On the Datasphere side you must have the permissions to setup a Connection with a System.

On the S4 side make sure that you have access to these apps. 

If you have all these requirements, then you are to go with the blog. 🙂

3.    Setup the Communication Settings in the S4

To build up the Connection between the S4 and Datasphere we must enable on the S4 side the communication between the S4 and other Systems. The first app that we we need to open is the App “Communication Arrangements.”

After that you can click on “New” to create a new Communication Arrangement. Then a pop up will appear. There you can search for the scenario “SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - WebSocket Integration”

After that you will jump in the Communication Arrangement. Then you can create a new communication System. This will be needed to declare which system will be take the data from the S4. For that click on new and enter a Name for your system and then click create.

Now you are in the Communication System. There you must enter the URL of your Datasphere tenant but make sure to remove the https:// of the URL. Your URL should be something like this: “your-datasphere-tenant.location.hcs.cloud.sap”

Then you can scroll down until you reach the options for the Inbound Communication User. There you can click on the + and press the button to create a new User.

You now can create your own user. Enter there a Name and Description for the User and then you can enter your own password, or you can propose own. After you have done it you can click on Create.

After you have created your Inbound Communication User you will be send back to the Communication System App. You will see that you User has been selected and you can confirm it by clicking “OK”.

Now you can scroll down to the Outbound Communication User. There you can click on the + to create a new User. In the Pop up you can select the Authentication Method of the User. There you can select “None” and then you can create the User.

Now you can save your communication System.

Now you are there where you have started. Select on the Authorization Group ID the Value “SAP_DSP_ALL” to have access to all Views from the S4.

Click on save and then you have setup everything on the S4 side.

4.    Make the Connection to S4 in Datasphere

Now that we are back in the Datasphere we can create the connection to the S4. Go to the Connections and click on “Create” there you select the Connection “SAP ABAP.”

Then you can enter your credentials:

 

Protocol: Web Socket RFC

SAP Logon Connection Type: Application Server

Application Server: your-s4-tenant-api.s4hana.cloud.sap

Port: 443

Client: 100

 

Username: YourUsernamefromtheInboundConnection

Password: YourPasswordfromtheInboundConnection

 

Then you can click on “Next Step”

Enter a Name for the Connection and click on “Create Connection”.

The connection is created. If you want to check, if the connection has worked. You can select the Connection and click on the Validate button. There your connection will be validated.

If it has worked, you will see this message:

Now you can work with the S4 Views in the Datasphere. 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Product Expert Training 2024 上半年度 5 月 10 日至 5 月 16 日
entry.content: @Y_Lou  请这个后面会有文档和录像链接分享吗？

entry.title: Re: MPN MRP in SAP S4HANA
entry.content:
1. If you maintain the Manufacturer and MPN in the purchasing View.

you can find the Manufacturer in the PO.

2. If you just maintain the "Mfr part profile" in the material master data.

you should maintain the information record for each MPN material. (ME11)

And maintain the Quota -  MEQ1

Create the PO with MPN material ,and MPN material will link to the company own material number.

In this step, for the material filed, you should enter the MPN not your company own material number.

entry.title: Re: Mass upload utility via API to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Build Process Automatio

entry.title: Re: Mass upload utility via API to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Build Process Automatio
entry.content:
Dear Satish,

This document serves as both a basic/generic guideline and a demonstration of product capabilities. Partners and customers can utilize it as a framework for creating their own build automates.

Regards

Sahil

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation- Validation form Bind Li...
entry.content: Just make all the DataType to required and it will work.

entry.title: Re: Working with Object Tables in SAP Mobile Development Kit
entry.content:
Here is an example of calling read with a filter and looping over the results.

export default function ValidateItems(context) {
    let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
    let clientData = pageProxy.getClientData();
    var valid = true;
    return context.read('/MDKApp/Services/Sample.service', 'MyEntitySet', [], `$filter=isMandatory eq 'X'`).then((results) => {
        if (results) {
            for (let i = 0; i < results.length; i++) {
                let item = results.getItem(i);
                // Validate item properties are set, can do as a single check or by muiltiple checks on the item
                if (item.prop1 && item.prop2) {
                    valid = true;
                } else {
                    valid = false;
                    // Display an error message? and quit loop?
                }
            }
            return valid;
        }
    });
}

The example is for the validation check is just a simple check.  You can expand that based on your requirements and decide what you want to do when a validation failure occurs.

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content: Can you share the detail page metadata please?

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content:
@bill_froelich this is my List view page,

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			},
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
					"_Name": "SectionObjectTable1",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"ObjectCells": [
						{
							"ObjectCell": {
								"_Name": "SectionObjectCell0",
								"Title": "$(L,fav_costobject_title)",
								"Visible": true,
								"Selected": false,
								"AccessoryType": "DisclosureIndicator",
								"PreserveIconStackSpacing": false,
								"OnPress": "/MDK/Actions/Favourites/NavToFavPaycode.action"
							}
						}						
					],
					"HighlightSelectedItem": false,
					"Selection": {
						"ExitOnLastDeselect": true,
						"LongPressToEnable": "None",
						"Mode": "None"
					}
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "FavouriteListView",
	"Caption": "$(L,fav_btn_title)",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

this is my deail page,

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			},
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
					"Target": {
						"Service": "/MDK/Services/StceApi.service",
						"EntitySet": "PayCodes",
						"QueryOptions": "$filter=payCodeType eq 'H' and favourite eq true"
					},
					"_Name": "SectionObjectTable0",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false,
						"Caption": "$(L,no_fav_paycode_added)"
					},
					"ObjectCell": {
						"ContextMenu": {
							"Items": [],
							"PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe": true,
							"LeadingItems": [],
							"TrailingItems": []
						},
						"Title": "{payCodeDesc}",
						"AccessoryType": "None",
						"AccessoryButtonIcon": "sap-icon://delete",					
						"Selected": false,
						"OnAccessoryButtonPress":"/MDK/Rules/Favourites/onFavPaycodeDelete.js",
						"Styles": {
							"AccessoryButtonIcon": "tealButton"
						}
					},
					"HighlightSelectedItem": false
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "FavouritePayCode",
	"Caption": "$(L,fav_paycodes_title)",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true,
	"ActionBar": {
		"Items": [
			{
				"_Name": "ActionBarItem0",
				"Caption": "Add New",
				"Position": "Right",
				"IsIconCircular": false,
				"Visible": true,
				"OnPress": "/MDK/Actions/Favourites/NavToPayCodeFavAddNewDialog.action",
				"Style": "tealButton"
			}
		],
		"_Name": "ActionBar1"
	}
}

and I have declared css like this,

@Teal : #008390;

ActionBar {
    color: @Teal;  
}
ActionBarTitle {
    color: @Teal;    
}
.tealButton{
    color: @Teal;    
}

entry.title: Re: Payment Listing applied AP Credit Note amount Query
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you tried adding a set of

CASE

WHEN InvType = "nn" THEN Amt

WHEN InvType = "yy" Amt * -1

END AS "Paid_To_Invoice_Amount"

statement as necessary?

Substitute the appropriate InvType values ...

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne Mar '24
entry.content: here's an update on how it went down: https://community.sap.com/t5/melbourne-discussions/melbourne-btp-innovation-day-amp-stammtisch-mar-24/m-p/13646163

entry.title: Goal Visibility - make private goals public
entry.content: Hi Experts, I am seeking you advise regarding Manager is unable to view direct report private goals. As an implementation consultant, I proxied as the direct report to edit the private goals, the visibility field has been disabled so it’s not possible to change it to public. The request is to make all the private goals public.

entry.title: Data transfer from Databricks to SAP - ODATA API
entry.content:
We need to move 200,000 records daily from a Data bricks environment on GCP to a custom table in SAP.
Since Data bricks can't expose workbook APIs due to their current capabilities , SAP will provide an OData API with a POST operation for data transfer. With the huge volume of data , performance can be a bottleneck . Below are the questions -

 

a) Is OData API intended for large data transfer ? What are the limitations ?
b) what are the best practices while transmitting huge volume data through ODATA rest API . Already aware of the Pagination / batching .
c) What other interfacing methods are possible with data bricks other than FTP and without any level of integration.

P.S : Exploring PyRFC from data bricks to call SAP RFC as an alternative.
        We don't use SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content: Very Informative. All you can refer at one place. Thank You Abhijit.

entry.title: Goa Visibility- make private goals public
entry.content: Hi Experts, I am seeking you advise regarding Manager is unable to view direct report private goals. As an implementation consultant, I proxied as the direct report to edit the private goals, the visibility field has been disabled so it’s not possible to change it to public. The request is to make all the private goals public.

entry.title: [BUG] Notification feed, doubles when multiple followed tags assigned
entry.content:
Hi,

Just noticed that in the notification feed, when a question has been given multiple tags that I follow, the notification comes on multiple times:

Please note that only one question was posted. It was assigned the SQL and Microsoft SQL Server tags, both of which I follow.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: How to set BOM when splitting material codes from dif...
entry.content: Yes, if you use the FFF Material, you should create a new material as a Main material. And for the other materials, there is not priority for them, you should specify the material by manual.

entry.title: What is the FIORI app for KE13 ?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Appreciate if you could share the upload fiori app for KE13.


Thanks in advance,

Dona

entry.title: Re: Need groovy script for SAP CPI to loop through the no...
entry.content:
Hi,

Got it, script was slightly modified to handle the dataType as in "Double" integer and here is the updated script. Give it a try now.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
    import java.util.HashMap;
    
    def Message processData(Message message) {
        //getting the input body
        def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
        //prasing the input XML body
        def xml = new XmlParser().parseText(body)
        //running each User node
        xml.User.each{ 
            recs ->
            timeAccount = recs.TimeAccount.timeAccountDetails.TimeAccountDetail
            //sort the timeaccount records based on the order of old to new date
            timeAccount.sort { 
                a, b ->
                Date.parse("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS", a.bookingDate.text()) <=> Date.parse("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS", b.bookingDate.text())
            }
            boolean customAddHour_Flag = false
            //get CustomField_BookingHours
            def rootHour = recs.CustomField_BookingHours.text().toDouble()
            //replace the Timeaccountdetail segment with the updated logic
            recs.TimeAccount.timeAccountDetails.replaceNode{
                timeAccountDetails{
                    timeAccount.each{
                        timeRecs ->
                        //copy the /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail
                        TimeAccountDetail{
                                bookingAmount(timeRecs.bookingAmount.text())
                                bookingDate(timeRecs.bookingDate.text())
                        }
                        
                        //get timeAccount - BookingAmount
                        def bAmount = timeRecs.bookingAmount.text().toDouble()
                        //add the hours
                        rootHour = rootHour + bAmount
                        //when hour is greater than or eauql to 0, add the new node after the TimeAccountDetail node
                        if(rootHour >= 0 && !customAddHour_Flag){
                            customAddHour_Flag = true
                            TimeAccountDetail{
                                bookingAmount(recs.CustomField_BookingHours.text())
                                bookingDate(recs.bookingDate.text())
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        //setting the output body
        message.setBody(groovy.xml.XmlUtil.serialize(xml))
        return message;
    }

 

 

GroovyIDE link for reference:

GroovyIDE Online Simulator

entry.title: #CoE#JJTOOLS Synchronize delivery quantity with picking quantity during sales shipment posting
entry.content:
When generating sales outbound delivery orders, in the initial interface, the delivery quantity is synchronized with the picking quantity and can be saved normally. However, the picking quantity synchronized before the VL02N shipment was posted and entered into the order for modification became zero.

This is achieved through enhanced synchronization：

Enhanced code：

 

The picking quantity disappeared during vl02n modification

entry.title: Expert Live Session on SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - June 10-12th 2024
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

From the SAP Product Learning team, I am excited to announce that we will be hosting a live session series for our innovative and versatile new product, SAP Sales Cloud V2! This set of 3 sessions for 1hr each with a product expert, and will be a fantastic opportunity for all of you looking to improve your knowledge from a functionality and configuration perspective.


SAP Sales Cloud V2, as most of you already know, offers an array of excellent features centered around improving your sales processes. It is a Cloud native solution designed for boosting productivity, managing customer relationships smarter, and getting better insights from your data.

In our upcoming series of live sessions, we will dive deeper into the functionality and value proposition of Sales Cloud V2, with live demonstrations, tips, and insights from our expert trainer. You will have an opportunity to ask any questions, raise inquiries and explore the full potential of the tool.

Be sure to secure your spot by signing up as soon as you can. We look forward to having you on board!

See you there!

Note: These sessions require a login with learning.sap.com or an SAP Learning Hub License.

Remember to register to all the three sessions to complete this series of learning.




Learning.sap.com


Details of the session


Session 1

In this session you will get an overview of various features in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2


Date: 10 June 2024


Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST


Session 2

This live session will help you learn about the new SAP Sales Cloud Version 2. The following topics will be included: Onboarding, Sales Cloud Version 2 set-up, and Fundamentals including Global Search, Extensibility, User & Control etc


Date: 11 June 2024


Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST


 


Session 3

This live session covers Sales Cloud Version 2 features in detail, such as Guided Selling, Digital Sales Engagement, Pipeline Management & Forecasting, MS Team integration and Autoflow.


Date: 12 June 2024


Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST


 

SAP Sales Cloud  Training Customer Experience

entry.title: sap mdk object table onPress highlight selected item still holds the prev selection on redraw
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing one strange issue with Object Table, I have a FormCell Layout where I have list view on my First Column and Detail View in Second Column. In the left side, I have to refresh the list based on the action bar item click, refreshing/redrawing the Object Table data is working fine, but If I pressed any object cell and refreshed the list, it still holds the previously pressed object cell. 

On the below example, I am displaying current weekly time entries, upon pressing any item(day) I have to show detail on the second column. If the user press action bar item, I am redrawing the whole section table and also object table, but it still highlights the previously pressed object cell. 

 

Is there any way I can remove that selection ? 

@bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal 

Thanks,

Ram

entry.title: Re: Lets add 2 Custom Embedding models to SAP AI CORE
entry.content: Very nice blog. It really helps. I can see you are sending only one text here, is it possible to send multiple texts in an array for creating the embeddings

entry.title: Re: Preparing for Universal Parallel Accounting
entry.content: Thank you for the comment! The restriction notes for the  2022 and 2023 version should provide the input you need look at.

entry.title: Re: Payment Listing applied AP Credit Note amount Query
entry.content:
Just like @sean_pvm is suggesting, you can use a CASE statement, this should work for you:

 

SELECT 
	 T0."DocDate" AS "Payment Date"
	,T0."DocNum" AS "Payment DocNum"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 18 THEN 'PU'
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 30 THEN 'JE'
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN 'PC'
	 END AS "DocType"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 18 THEN T3."DocDate"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 30 THEN T4."RefDate"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T5."DocDate"
	 END AS "DocDate"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 18 THEN T3."DocNum"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 30 THEN T4."Number"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T5."DocNum"
	 END AS "DocNum"
	,T0."CardCode" 
	,T0."CardName"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 18 THEN T3."NumAtCard"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 30 THEN T4."Ref2"
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T5."NumAtCard"
	 END AS "Ref Num"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T0."TrsfrSum" * -1
		ELSE T0."TrsfrSum" 
	 END AS "Transfer Amount"
	,T0."DocCurr"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T0."TrsfrSumFC" * -1
		ELSE T0."TrsfrSumFC"
	 END AS "Transfer Amount (FC)"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T1."SumApplied" * -1
		ELSE T1."SumApplied"
	 END AS "Paid to Invoice"
	,CASE
		WHEN T1."InvType" = 19 THEN T1."AppliedFC" * -1
		ELSE T1."AppliedFC"
	 END AS "Paid in FC"

FROM 
	OVPM T0
	INNER JOIN VPM2 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocNum"
	LEFT JOIN VPM1 T2 ON T1."DocNum" = T2."DocNum"
	LEFT JOIN OPCH T3 ON T1."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"
	LEFT JOIN OJDT T4 ON T1."DocEntry"= T4."TransId"
	LEFT JOIN ORPC T5 ON T1."DocEntry" = T5."DocEntry"

WHERE T0."DocDate" >= [%0] AND T0."DocDate" <=[%1]

 

 Good luck!

M

entry.title: Which table to get sales area of the customer?

We want area associated with the customer from the customer master table? Which exact table to be used to accomplish the task?

Regards,

SS

entry.title: Re: Changing Live data source from SAP Datasphere to the...
entry.content:
Hi @PongsatornK,

Your use case should be fulfilled with next QRC 2.2024 of SAC which will be available after the next weekend. A replacement of live models on story level is available then. See this blog for further details.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Transport request in npm deploy is blank: Error is 400
entry.content:
Hi @SBasu1234 ,

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/error-400-trying-to-deploy-a-sap-fiori-app-to-sap-btp-abap-environment/qaq-p/12764418/comment-id/4791732#M4791732 is about SAP BTP, ABAP environment. A transport request is needed in this case.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-bas-develop-s4hc.html is about key user extensibility in S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. In this case, no transport request is needed. 

The screenshot indicates that there is a long text that can be displayed in the browser. Did you check it? This might give a hint why the request fails with status code 400.

Best regards
Kai

P.S: If you want to implement a Fiori app using developer extensibility, then have a look at https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html.  


Kai

entry.title: Re: How to select other user name in outgoing payment dra...
entry.content:
Hello!

Take a look at the Payment Wizard process with Payment Orders.  It is designed for one user to run the Payment Wizard process for a batch of payments, save it as a Payment Order.

You can print the Payment Order for approval, then you just run the Payment Wizard again and execute the Payment Order to finish the payments.

Takes a little bit to setup the Payment Wizard stuff but then it's smoother than manual drafts.

M

entry.title: Re: Limiting PDF Generation to Specific Documents in Prin...
entry.content:
This can be perfectly handled by B1UP: Print & Delivery.  You can set the "Report Action" so that when a user pushes the print button it generates a PDF either on-screen or in a specific location.  This can be configured document-by-document as you need it to happen.

It's worth looking into:

http://b1updemo.battleshipcobra.com/

M

entry.title: Re: Which table to get sales area of the customer?
entry.content: Hello, KNVV may help.

entry.title: Re: Which table to get sales area of the customer?
entry.content:
Hello,

It's better to Tag such questions with respective Functional domain Tags like 'Sales and Distribution' for getting exact answer.

KNVV (Customer Master Sales Data) should be the Table which should help in this case.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Planning using Validation Models

entry.title: Denying access for user **** to resource /sap/bc/adt/discovery on system ****
entry.content:
If you encounter a connection error via a cloud connector, one possible reason could be that subpaths have not been granted access permissions. Below is a common error message you might see:

Denying access for user **** to resource /sap/bc/adt/discovery on system ****

To resolve this issue, consider the following steps in your configuration:

  1. Update Your Destination Configuration: Ensure that your destination configuration includes "dev_abap" and "ui5_execute_abap" as values in the WebIDEUsage additional property.

  2. Enable the Necessary Service: Verify that the service /sap/bc/adt/ is enabled in your backend system. This can typically be done via the transaction SICF.

  3. Adjust Access Control Settings: Navigate to the 'Cloud To On-Premise' menu and select the 'Access Control' tab. Here, make sure to grant access to the necessary subpaths. Configure your settings as shown in the screenshot below to ensure the problem is resolved.

By following these steps, you should be able to address most connection issues related to cloud connectors effectively.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

to my understanding, price determination in the Advanced Intercompany Sales Process is currently independent for each stage:

- Customer facing Sales Order => Sales-Price 

- IC Purchase Order (NBAI) => Purchase Price based on Inforecord

- Internal Sales Order (CBIC) => independent Sales Price in Intercompany Entity

So there's 3 levels of Price masterdata required to be maintained; technically independent from each other but from a process perspective the IC-Price in CBIC Sales Order and NBAI Purchase Order are the same.

Are there any plans to offer some way of integrated pricing in future, e.g. to calculate an Intercompany-Price based on a Markdown from Salesprice in 1st Salesorder to be used in internal documents (NBAI, CBIC)?

Thanks

Florian

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM Scenario with Pricing Parent and Child item...
entry.content:
Hi,

Perhaps leveraging AVC could provide an alternative method, ensuring all levels of the BoMs are priced. Alternatively, you may try modifying your BoM design to include a component (child item) that represents the base price, which aligns with your current parent item.

Best Regards
Fancy

entry.title: How to consider time for repacking when calculating material availability date in sales order
entry.content:
We have a scenario where we need to consider time for repacking spare part material from pallets into boxes as part of the outbound delivery process for one customer. We use same material in in-house production without repacking. But, when procuring the material to fulfill the customer demand we need to purchase the material n days before normal case.

Where can we store the information about the repacking time needed per customer/material, and how can we use this information during ATP check so material availability date is correct and procurement started n days in advance of normal case?

entry.title: Re: Call (submit) VL10B with multiple parameters
entry.content:
Hello,

It's impossible to set the select parameter values of VL10*.

You'd better implement a user-exit according to the note 524424.

https://me.sap.com/notes/524424/E

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Interpretation issue - with MD04 vs RRP3-Missing Quan...
entry.content:
Thanks Yasmin- got your point- - post running of CCR all masters and Transac. data has been moved to APO from S4-

the real issue for me is decoding -I have decoded below -hope I am almost rite-

MD04 status as on -13/05/2024 – IST (System date today date )

Date - 15/05/2024 ( meaning : creation date of planned order)

MRP element -PLdORd

Opening date -14-05-2024 ( meaning : the date it enters the shop floor for execution OR the date in which it gets operative )

MRP element data- 0033014174/STCK ( ( meaning : the planned order quantity has been consumed from STCK)

Receipt/Reqmt -144 (meaning : the demand from Sales order or forecast -but how we know this from where in the system do we find this ? 144 is what receipt or req??/ }

Available Quantity- 468 ( what is available ? )

Storage location -WE01

Details picked up from RRP3 screen details for same material

Start date- 14-05-2024

Start time- 17.49.38

Category- Pl.Ord

Receipt/Reqmt element -0033014174

Manufacturing process- 20

Available Qty/Req Qty 15.05.2024

Avail/reqT-18.03.2024 Req-

req Qty – 144

Total Qty- 144

Available Qty- 434 ( it has to be 468 as according to MD04 screen  ..Isn’t it? Why it is not there ? )

Surp/Short – 144 ( where this 144 is coming from )

Resource-WK-12-UTY

SAP  doesn't speak a simple shop floor simple language ....any help in decoding is welcome  .

entry.title: How to check the root cause of no EWA report created?
entry.content:
How to check the root cause of  no EarlyWatch Alert being created for one particular system?

The status shows a "red flag".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the root cause of no EWA report created?
entry.content:
Dear customer,

the "red flag" (service data overdue) means that SDCCN download is missing/ has not arrived yet.

For ABAP systems you need to check transaction SDCCN of the managed system->

1769513 EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) not generated - session data is overdue (red flag status)
2729186 General Process of EWA Generation in SAP Solution Manager 7.2
3240017 SDCCN - Activation and Basic Setup for Managed Systems 

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: scheduling agreement - Output issue
entry.content: any update with regards to above query?

entry.title: Re: Mac SSO
entry.content: You don't need a certificate. The Mac can be joined to Microsoft Active Directory and you can use a Kerberos ticket for SAP GUI on macOS. The user will get an SSO experience. Many of our customers use our product for this functionality.

entry.title: SAPUI5 Apple Watch
entry.content:
Is it possible to use the SAPUI5 framework to develop an application running on a Apple Watch?
There is already a web-based SAPUI5 application, but the login in the Apple Watch browser does not work. 

I need to enable a user to log into SAP on an Apple Watch and then access a SAPUI5 application.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Financial Closing: Change communication system
entry.content:
Hi, for several reasons you can`t change the communication system. You need to create a new template for your production communication system. Further you will require for testing a template connected to you dev or test system(s). 

Did you check Task List Models?

300+ tasks for one company code sounds a bit much. Maybe you can check the detailing of the tasks if it is really required.

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Cancel Call Object in the Maintenance Plan with No Shift
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have an issue with scheduling plan dates for call objects in the Maintenance Plan. The call object is notification, Shift factor is 100% and the Completion Requirement is ticked. In this scenario, the notification is a routine alarm.

The routine may not be performed on the planned date. In this case, the notification needs to be closed (Canceled), but the plant date of the next call object should not change (not shift). Is there a standard solution for this?

Regards

entry.title: Re: Handling profile parameter values in SAP NetWeaver and SAP HANA
entry.content: Thanks for the well-structured, comprehensive presentation of this essential topic.

entry.title: Re: Major difference in S4H from ECC
entry.content:
I think it may be tough to answer this, as there is both comes with pros and cons, here are both 

Cloud for Agility and Scalability:

Pros: Cloud providers like SAP constantly manage and optimize hardware, often leading to strong performance.

Cons: Network latency can impact performance, especially for geographically dispersed users.

On-Premise for Control and Customization:Pros: Direct control over hardware allows fine-tuning for specific needs, potentially leading to top performance for your unique setup.

Cons: Requires significant IT investment to maintain and upgrade hardware, impacting agility.

So choose wisely, whichever suits your requirement. If you like my response, you can review several blogs written by me for healthcare software development field

entry.title: Re: How to link two P ID which itself a UID
entry.content:
Hi @arindamsur - please contact Universal ID support through our Customer Interaction Center: https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us.html?anchorId=section_42886245

You can request to unlink one of the P-user IDs and relink it to the Universal ID account you would like to use moving forward. That way you will have all your certifications connected to one Universal ID.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order: Undo Deletion of Deleted Operations
entry.content:
Hi @Anish0502,

thanks for your comment. What do you mean with tagged components? Components which are deleted due to a deleted operations will be available again after you have undone the deletion of the operation. This is only possible for released orders.

If you have activated the business function and this is still not the case, please create an incident regarding this issue. My colleagues from Support will help you with this as soon as possible.

Best regards,
Anika

Hello, 

I am wonder if would be possible to extract the information of the tracking list, to have it copied into different reports:

 

but I am not able to find where it is storage do you have some idea?

entry.title: Re: Transport request in npm deploy is blank: Error is 400

But since the standard app is in customizing client where I have to eventually plug in the development hence its important to move to that client. Or else can you tell me if input data of the FIORI can be posted to a standard API

entry.title: S4 Hana and APO-combine - yields far too many planned orders
entry.content:
Hi all ,

I am a shop floor engineer - working on S4 HANA and APO- we convert planned order to production order and send it to shop floor - for some APO materials -off late- i see lots of planned order generated and i dont have control over it-

In MD04 i see far too many planned orders which is creating excessive stress on upstream process like making too many  purchase requisition, and in house Superfluous production orders

How do i have control over my planned orders generated ? is it in SPRO settings of S4 HANA and Advanced planning  or MRP settings of S4HANA and Product master setting of APO  

Where precisely should i check which parameters OR which Fields ??

System behavior when it comes to creation of planned orders is erratic ..

Point to be noted MRP is run in the background. 

 

Expert can you please provide some ideas on this ?

entry.title: Re: Transport request in npm deploy is blank: Error is 400
entry.content: Please have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/c79fa657501546fa8d9a4eee07409b7b.html: "Only OData services from your custom service binding are supported. API services on SAP Business Accelerator HubInformation published on SAP site are not supported. They are released for external consumption only."

entry.title: Extracting Large Table Data from SAP ECC / S4H
entry.content:
Are there any recommended methods for extracting large table data from ECC / S4H via a remote connection?

Function Module RFC_READ_TABLE is available but not release for customer use and therefore not recommended. What would be a suitable alternative (SAP, custom, or 3rd party) for extracting large tables (million+ records)?

My understanding is that CDS views are also not recommended for extracting large volumes of table data?

entry.title: Re: Call (submit) VL10B with multiple parameters
entry.content:
Hi,

You are trying to submit data to the wrong program (RVV50R10_PRESTEP). The correct program for your task is RVV50R10C.

Additionally, the field values you're currently providing might not be sufficient for a successful submission with RVV50R10C. I recommend you do the following:

  1. Open tcode VL10B -> enter your desired data in input field -> save your input as a new variant.
  2. Open tcode SE38 -> enter RVV50R10C as program name -> choose "Variants" radio button -> Display the values of your newly created variant
  3. Now when you're submitting RVV50R10C, I recommend you pass all of the "non-empty" parameters that you see in step 2

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Private Options - Memory impact on Performance
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I discovered that there are multiple client versions related to available memory for the SAC tenant. Check out the following link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/5f61b6509a5e4d499e8cb9685f32db73.html 

 

This leads me to believe that SAC performance (such as opening stories and planning) is significantly influenced by memory and bandwidth. Since we are currently experiencing performance issues despite optimization efforts, could increasing memory and bandwidth be a viable solution?

Does SAP provide an option to increase the aforementioned parameters for testing purposes?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: ISO XML file in Chinese language in public cloud
entry.content:
Is there any configuration possible to convert the ISO xml file to Chinese language in S4 Hana Public Cloud ?

Banks of china accepts only Chinese contents and therefore ISO xml file generated from SAP (in English) needs to be translated and then uploaded to bank. 

Looking forward for settings/configs/ suggestions.

 

Current process was to prepare an excel and use the AI tool for translation to Chinese and then upload the excel to the bank.

entry.title: Re: Call (submit) VL10B with multiple parameters
entry.content: I think it is - VL10B ca be run as a background job with a variant. The same way it should be possible to run it with SUBMIT

entry.title: Is there an SDK installation for sap 10.00.240?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to use the latest version of SDK but in the patch package (10.00.240), I have SDK version 10.00.230.

Is there an SDK version 10.00.240? if so, how can I get it?

I appreciate any help you can provide.

Odele

entry.title: Re: Call (submit) VL10B with multiple parameters
entry.content:
Hello @naotoxxx 

You should submit the report RVV50R10C, not RVV50R10_PRESTEP.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

What is the character limit for numeric dialing? Is there any documentation from SAP for this for us to inform our customers about? Thank You

entry.title: Re: Cannot edit task list object with activity type error - RCPTRA02 LSMW Direct Input
entry.content:
Hi,

Maintain value as shown below

H Create Object
L Delete Object
V Change Object

Regards,

Shan Pinto

If the playlists/videos you're looking for haven't been moved to microlearning.openSAP.com then they're no longer available.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to connect database between SAP Business Application Studio and SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to know how to show all schemas on my SAP HANA Database Explorer in SaP Business Application Studio.

When I use SAP HANA Cloud in the Cloud Foundry spaces, it shows all schemas that I created before, but when I attempt to use SAP Business App Studio, it won't show all schemas except one whose name is the same as the Database user's.

 

For example, my database admin account is DBADMIN; the SAP business app studio only shows DBADMIN.

My HANA Cloud plan used Hana-free and didn't deploy the Hana data lake.

 

Here's the capture where in my Cloud Foundry space.

Here's the capture where in my SAP Business App Studio development environment.

 

 

 

Could anyone tell me how to fix it, or can I only show all the schemas when I use the paid plan?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP MII How insert data to MDO throught illuminator
entry.content:
Ok, I got it, but what if I have table like this:
Col 1                   Col2
Value1              Value5
Value2              Value6
Value3              Value7
Value4              Value8

And I would like to update value3 in Col1 to different value. Is it even possible throught illuminator service?

entry.title: SAP Companion page showing on the new Org Chart page
entry.content:
We are opting for the new Org Chart but disabling the new people profile. With this, when user goes to Org Chart, the screen pops up a message that I understand is the standard SAP Companion's "What's New?" message. This message talks about the new People Profile as well as the new Org Chart (see screenshot below). 

Is there a way to customize this text to show only the Org Chart related announcement and not People Profile? If not, what option do I have?

entry.title: Re: Text Color Not working
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski .
Sorry for the late reply. I encountered this issue when i hide the text on initial and then show it with a trigger like a button.

entry.title: Re: Extracting Large Table Data from SAP ECC / S4H
entry.content: Extract to where? What database software is it? NB: if you access it directly, it's better of course.

entry.title: Re: What is the use of Mapped in SAP RESTFul ABAP Program...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please find the below information on REPORTED and MAPPED Parameters of the RAP's Behavior Implementation Classes.

1.) REPORTED , Reported is used to provide the Context Information (like if the response code is failure say '500' then what could be the reasons for the same) as a response after a REST API call. It helps in filling the HTTP Response HEADER parameter 'sap-message', which you could notice in case of normal SEGW based OData Services as well.

2.) MAPPED, is relevant only for CREATE operation. Suppose you are calling an API for Purchase Order creation, then after a successful call and execution of the API call you should receive back the Purchase Order number generated. So, MAPPED helps in this case, in the EntitySet for Purchase Order you can MAP the generated Purchase Order number to the PO number Property of the EntitySet and it would be sent back as a Response, the same thing which we used to do in 'ET_ENTITYSET' parameters in the DPC Implementation of SEGW based OData REST API creation.

Please refer below page for more details,

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/implicit-response-parameters

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: SAP Build Actions - Sales Order Removal Billing Block Reason is not possible
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to remove the billing block reason of a sales order via an Action in SAP Build Process Automation. We are able to set the billing block reason but are unable to remove it. We tested the API in Postman and were able to remove the billing block reason by passing an empty string "". SAP Build Process Automation does not allow us to pass empty strings. We have also tried '' and NULL (in different variations as well) but without success. We also tried using the UpdateAndRead - Sales Order Billing Block Action from the store but without success either.

Is there a different way to remove the billing block reason of a sales order?

We are using this API:
https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/overview

Thank you for your help.
Best Regards

Paul

entry.title: Disable popup dialog when I am going to create a new record in a list report
entry.content:
Hello experts, I want that when I press the create button in my list report, it goes directly to the object page to create the data there, in terms of annotations I do not have any fields that appear but the id always appears, however undo continue and the id is generated only with a sequential

<Annotation Term="Capabilities.InsertRestrictions">
<Record Type="Capabilities.InsertRestrictionsType">
<PropertyValue Property="RequiredProperties">
<Collection>
</Collection>
</PropertyValue>

 


</Record>
</Annotation>

 

Thx for any help

 

Best regards,

Santiago

entry.title: Re: Call (submit) VL10B with multiple parameters
entry.content:
It only concerns customer-specific selection criteria.

524424 - VL10: Transfer customer-specific selection criteria - SAP for Me

Hi @Dan_Wroblewski , @MaiaraEllwanger , @marihirvi 

Date Picker is Blank (IOS)

iOS 17.4.1 - not working
iOS 17.1.2 - working
